sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_a4f9a38893b1cb90a748f9fbdd03d64a
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_2056490_smart_0_booking</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Prevent Double Booking</name><order>200</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous) {

    var gr = new GlideRecord('x_2056490_smart_0_booking');

    gr.addQuery('resource', current.resource);
    gr.addQuery('booking_date', current.booking_date);
    gr.addQuery('start_time', current.start_time);
    gr.addQuery('end_time', current.end_time);

    // Ignore the current record during updates
    gr.addQuery('sys_id', '!=', current.sys_id);

    gr.query();

    if (gr.next()) {

        gs.addErrorMessage(
            'This resource is already booked for the selected date and time.'
        );

        current.setAbortAction(true);
    }

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-26 06:06:06</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>a4f9a38893b1cb90a748f9fbdd03d64a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Prevent Double Booking</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Smart Campus Resource Booking" source="x_2056490_smart_0">7b689bff93614b90a748f9fbdd03d6e3</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Smart Campus Resource Booking">7b689bff93614b90a748f9fbdd03d6e3</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_a4f9a38893b1cb90a748f9fbdd03d64a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-26 06:06:06</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=a4f9a38893b1cb90a748f9fbdd03d64a"/></record_update>

    var resource = new GlideRecord('x_2056490_smart_0_resource');
